title: 🚨 ANNOUNCEMENT 🚨  Last Sunday so many people tipped for that..
content:
🚨 ANNOUNCEMENT 🚨

Last Sunday so many people tipped for that extra bit of 🌶️ attention for the week. From this point forward, any tip on a Sunday will make responding to your messages my priority for the following week.

The person with the highest tip of the week will be pinned as my #1 Best Friend on Snapchat, and will receive boyfriend priority responses and 🌶️ attention all week.

I will always respond to everyone no matter what, this structure will simply determine priority. Tipping on Sunday is (and always will be) totally optional and there’s no pressure to do so. It’s for the people that really love talking/sexting throughout the week. This will not affect the frequency of content uploaded; I think it will actually supplement my regular content leading to more for everybody. I’ll be posting about it on my story later too.

Thank you all for your time, presence, and support. ♥️
